steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says Noguchi's father was "trying to <u>find</u> me among some other people" at a train station after eleven years apart. The context is a crowded station where the father is searching for his son. The word must mean something consistent with visually scanning a crowd to spot someone.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Discredit: means to damage someone's reputation. A father searching for his returning son at a station is not trying to undermine or embarrass him. ✗
  • Choice B — Reveal: means to expose or disclose something hidden. The father is not trying to expose the narrator to others — he's scanning a crowd to spot him. ✗
  • Choice C — Affect: means to have an impact or influence on something. This produces no coherent meaning in the phrase "trying to affect me among some other people." ✗
  • Choice D — Locate: means to find the position of someone or something. The father is scanning a crowd at a station trying to spot his son — he is trying to locate him. ✓
That is the correct answer.
